content_body: Tenth Anniversary! Fantastic stay! We wanted to sit back and relax. This is the perfect place. Love the porch and fireplace. We were without two small children for the first time in three years. Nothing better than a glass of wine without any noise. We are very well rested. The cabin was GREAT. Felt just like home. If you have a chance to check out Tallulah Falls (a bit of a drive), and get a massage at Serenity spa. We will be back.
title: Tenth Anniversary in the North Georgia Mountains
